topic: is 1st image you dont seee it?
summary: The Assistant confirmed receipt of the file "merchants in a line before the gate.png," which the Director referred to as the "1st image." However, the Assistant's system identifies the file as an SVG XML icon or C2PA provenance marker, preventing visual processing of its content. Consequently, the Assistant cannot see the depicted scene (gate, wall, merchants) and cannot use it as a visual reference to ensure "100% unchanged architecture" for the gate and wall. The Assistant requires either a description of the image content or a re-upload in a standard image format (JPEG/PNG) to proceed.
